en.summary: OpenCove 0.2.1 fixes EPIPE startup errors, corrects Gateway port configuration, and adds Chinese tutorial.

items.summary: Fixed EPIPE startup error by enhancing PTY Host error handling and Windows compatibility.
Corrected Gateway port from 9876 to 12082 to match actual server configuration.
Added comprehensive Chinese tutorial (TUTORIAL_ZH.md) for local users.
Pre-configured OpenClaw API connection settings with test functionality.

zh-CN.summary: OpenCove 0.2.1 修复 EPIPE 启动错误，修正 Gateway 端口配置，新增中文使用教程。

items.summary: 修复 EPIPE 启动错误，增强 PTY Host 错误处理和 Windows 兼容性。
修正 Gateway 端口从 9876 改为 12082，匹配实际服务器配置。
新增完整中文使用教程 TUTORIAL_ZH.md。
预置 OpenClaw API 连接配置，支持连接测试功能。
